```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?club ?appearances WHERE {
  VALUES ?club {
    wd:Q3044572 wd:Q2272176 wd:Q2521385
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?club wdt:P1273 ?wins
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?club wdt:P1114 ?losses
  }
  BIND((COALESCE(?wins , 0) + COALESCE(?losses , 0)) AS ?appearances)
  FILTER(?appearances > 0)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?appearances)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1
```
